name: windows_us_custom_hid_ime
description: Diagnostic-only profile for Windows 11 US keyboard layout with a companion custom HID IME receiver. Do not enable by default for normal use.

notes: This route is diagnostic-only because it requires a Windows helper app.
The Windows receiver owns the mapping from command IDs to VK_CONVERT, VK_NONCONVERT, VK_KANA, VK_IME_ON, or VK_IME_OFF.
Prefer the helperless standard keyboard HID route for normal use.
The standard keyboard, mouse, Vial Raw HID, and consumer endpoints must continue to work without this profile.
